description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in layered urban casual attire, featuring a zip-up hoodie beneath a rugged, slightly worn leather jacket. He wears dark, loose-fitting pants and sturdy lace-up boots suitable for city walking. His hands are partially covered by fingerless gloves, adding a practical, streetwise touch. The figure's face is neutral, with short, closely cropped hair and no visible facial hair. The overall build is average, with a natural, relaxed stance and arms slightly outstretched. The clothing and accessories suggest readiness for cool weather and urban environments.
description: An adult male in layered urban casual clothing, including a leather jacket, hoodie, gloves, pants, and boots, standing in a relaxed pose.
description_view_0: Front view showing the layered jacket and hoodie, gloves, facial features, and boots clearly.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the jacket, pants, and boots, with the glove and facial profile visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the leather jacket, pants, and the back of the boots, with the head and gloves visible from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side profile of the jacket, pants, and boots, with the glove and facial profile visible.
attribute_clothing_type: casual zip-up hoodie layered under a leather jacket, loose-fitting pants, fingerless gloves
